states.name: queued
states.description: Logical Transfer Run is durable and waiting for eligibility/resources.

states.name: preparing
states.description: Source/destination, credentials, partial state and transport are being prepared/revalidated.
entry_requirements: Current authority and Provider context are valid.

states.name: transferring
states.description: One or more physical Attempts are moving bytes.

states.name: paused
states.description: Transfer is intentionally paused with resumable state retained if supported.
entry_requirements: Pause acknowledgement and resume limitations exist.

states.name: waiting
states.description: Transfer waits for capacity, network, credential, retry timer or external dependency.
entry_requirements: Structured wait reason and wake condition exist.

states.name: verifying
entry_requirements: Transport stopped/finalized enough for declared verification.

states.name: completed
states.description: Required verification/acceptance scope passed and accepted output references exist.
entry_requirements: Required Transfer Verification domains and Receipts passed.

states.name: failed
states.description: Transfer terminally failed; partial/quarantined state and evidence remain.
entry_requirements: Typed failure, partial-state disposition and Receipts exist.

states.name: cancelled
states.description: Transfer ended by cancellation with temporary/partial state reconciled.

states.name: uncertain
states.description: A non-idempotent provider finalize/commit outcome is unresolved pending read-back/reconciliation.
entry_requirements: Exact Attempt/generation and uncertainty evidence exist.

required_preconditions: Accepted Request and distinct Activity/Operation/Run exist.
Source/destination/current authority and resume dimensions are valid.
New Attempt/nonce and exact Provider/generation/epoch exist.
Provider supports safe pause and durable resume state/limitations are retained.
Finalize/commit/delivery may have occurred and automatic retry is unsafe.
Required verification domains and accepted output references passed.
Failure policy is terminal and partial/quarantine disposition is retained.
Cancellation/cleanup and uncertain/partial state are reconciled.
